mapper.select: SELECT C.POST_ID, C.TITLE, C.CONTENTS, CASE WHEN C.ANONYMOUS = 1 THEN '익명' ELSE COALESCE(U.NAME, C.WRITER) END AS WRITER, C.VIEW_COUNT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.USER_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY R WHERE R.POST_ID = C.POST_ID ) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM C_BOARD C LEFT JOIN USERS U ON C.WRITER = U.LOGIN_ID ORDER BY C.POST_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT C.POST_ID, C.TITLE, C.CONTENTS, CASE WHEN C.ANONYMOUS = 1 THEN '익명' ELSE COALESCE(U.NAME, C.WRITER) END AS WRITER, C.USER_ID, U.NAME, C.VIEW_COUNT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.USER_ID FROM C_BOARD C LEFT JOIN USERS U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE C.POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_BOARD ( POST_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, WRITER, USER_ID, ANONYMOUS ) VALUES ( C_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, -- 생성하신 시퀀스 명칭 확인 필요 #{title}, #{contents}, #{writer}, #{userId}, -- 로그인한 사용자의 고유 번호 #{anonymous} )
mapper.update: UPDATE C_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, WRITER = #{writer}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
